objectives: Get a light source and explore the caves
Open the sealed forge and retrieve the enchanted blade
Defeat the stone dragon and claim the Starfire Gem
theme: Dark fantasy cave with glowing crystals, ancient stone architecture, misty atmosphere
global_theme: Dark fantasy cave with glowing crystals, ancient stone architecture, misty atmosphere

locations.name: Cave Mouth
locations.description: A wide rocky entrance where daylight fades into shadow. An old hermit sits beside a crackling campfire. A coil of rope hangs from a spike driven into the wall.

locations.name: Mushroom Grotto
locations.description: A damp cavern lit by clusters of glowing blue mushrooms. Ancient wall carvings depict a forge being lit by sparks. A piece of flint glints on the ground near a dead campfire.

locations.name: Dark Passage
locations.description: A narrow pitch-black tunnel. Without a light source you cannot see anything. The air smells of damp stone and something musky.

locations.name: Underground River
locations.description: A roaring underground river cuts through the cavern. A rickety rope bridge spans the gap but a massive troll stands guard at the far side, snarling.
locations.blocked_by: River Troll guards the bridge (fears fire)

locations.name: Ancient Forge
locations.description: A vast chamber dominated by a cold stone forge and anvil. An iron door on the far wall is sealed with a heavy lock. Soot-blackened runes circle the forge reading: FIRE AWAKENS WHAT STONE REMEMBERS.
locations.blocked_by: iron door to Dragon's Vault is locked (need iron key)

locations.name: Dragon's Vault
locations.description: A treasure chamber bathed in amber light from crystal veins in the walls. A stone dragon crouches before a pedestal holding a brilliant Starfire Gem. The dragon's eyes glow when you approach.
scenery: ancient mural of a hero with a glowing blade
locations.blocked_by: stone dragon guardian (only an enchanted blade can pierce its heart)

npcs.name: Old Hermit
npcs.personality: friendly but cautious old explorer who lost his nerve years ago
npcs.provides: gives torch freely, warns that a troll lives near the river and fears fire, hints that the deep forge holds a powerful weapon

npcs.name: Forge Spirit
npcs.personality: ancient whispering presence that awakens when the forge is lit
npcs.provides: reveals the enchanted blade hidden in the anvil, warns that only this blade can defeat the stone dragon

monsters.name: River Troll
monsters.weakness: panics and flees when shown fire from the torch
monsters.drops: iron key (fell from its nest when it fled)

monsters.name: Stone Dragon
monsters.weakness: only the enchanted blade from the forge can pierce its stone heart
monsters.blocks: access to the Starfire Gem on the pedestal

riddles.hint: FIRE AWAKENS WHAT STONE REMEMBERS — runes circling the forge
riddles.solution: use flint on forge (or light forge)
riddles.reward: forge ignites, Forge Spirit appears, enchanted blade revealed in anvil

riddles.hint: Wall carvings show figures striking sparks into a great forge, and a blade emerging from flame
riddles.solution: this is a clue, not a puzzle — it foreshadows the forge puzzle
riddles.reward: player learns that fire and the forge are connected

key_items.name: torch
key_items.purpose: illuminates Dark Passage and scares the River Troll

key_items.name: rope
key_items.purpose: secures the bridge crossing at Underground River

key_items.name: flint
key_items.purpose: lights the Ancient Forge to reveal the enchanted blade

key_items.name: explorer journal
key_items.purpose: contains a note: 'The troll fled when I waved my torch. It dropped something metal as it ran.'

key_items.name: iron key
key_items.purpose: unlocks the iron door from Ancient Forge to Dragon's Vault

key_items.name: enchanted blade
key_items.purpose: the only weapon that can pierce the Stone Dragon's heart

key_items.name: Starfire Gem
key_items.purpose: the legendary treasure — bring it back to Cave Mouth to complete the quest

item_locations.torch: Given by Old Hermit at Cave Mouth
item_locations.rope: Hanging from a spike on the wall at Cave Mouth
item_locations.flint: On the ground near the dead campfire in Mushroom Grotto
item_locations.explorer journal: On the floor in the Dark Passage, visible once lit with torch
item_locations.iron key: Dropped by the River Troll when it flees from fire
item_locations.enchanted blade: Revealed in the anvil when the Ancient Forge is lit with flint
item_locations.Starfire Gem: On the pedestal in Dragon's Vault, guarded by Stone Dragon

progression_hints: Talk to the hermit — he has a torch and useful warnings
Explore every room and examine things before moving deeper
The wall carvings in the grotto hint at what the forge needs
Read the journal — a dead explorer's notes reveal the troll's weakness
Fire is your most versatile tool: it lights, it scares, it forges

mechanics.action: give torch or wave torch at troll
mechanics.effect: troll panics, flees across bridge, drops iron key from its nest

mechanics.action: use flint on forge or light forge
mechanics.effect: forge ignites, Forge Spirit appears, enchanted blade revealed in anvil

mechanics.action: use iron key on iron door
mechanics.effect: iron door unlocks, passage to Dragon's Vault opens

mechanics.action: use enchanted blade on stone dragon
mechanics.effect: blade pierces dragon's heart, dragon crumbles, Starfire Gem accessible
secures the rope bridge for safe crossing

puzzle_chain.action: read explorer journal in Dark Passage
use iron key on iron door
use enchanted blade on Stone Dragon

main_arc: A daring explorer descends into ancient caves seeking the legendary Starfire Gem. To reach it they must outwit a bridge troll, rekindle a forgotten forge, and defeat a stone dragon with the enchanted blade hidden within.
win_condition: Obtain the Starfire Gem and return to Cave Mouth
